home.title: Earth resistance. Instantly determined.
home.subtitle: Two professional calculators for electricians and contractors. From maximum resistance to exact rod depth — backed by BRO soil data.
home.card1Desc: Calculate the maximum grounding resistance per NEN 1010. Choose your grid, installation type and RCD — get four output layers instantly.
home.card2Desc: Enter a postal code. EarthGND automatically retrieves soil type, groundwater depth and pH from BRO — and calculates the required rod depth.
home.pillar1Desc: Soil type, groundwater depth and pH directly from the Dutch Soil Registration by postal code.
home.pillar2Desc: All calculations conform to NEN 1010, NEN 62305 and NEN 50522 — including legal maximum.
home.pillar3Desc: Export a substantiated PDF with input values, formula and risk class for your file.

ohm.title: Resistance Calculator
ohm.subtitle: Maximum grounding resistance — free, no account required.
ohm.ctaTitle: How deep should the rod go?
ohm.ctaDesc: The Rod Depth Calculator computes the exact rod length based on your soil, groundwater and pH.

diepte.title: Rod Depth Calculator
diepte.subtitle: Exact rod length based on your location and soil conditions.
diepte.disclaimer: Indicative estimate based on Dwight's formula and BRO soil data. Always measure on-site after installation per NEN 3140.
diepte.loginDesc: The Rod Depth Calculator is available for subscribers.
diepte.noCreditsDesc: You have run out of credits. Buy more or upgrade your plan.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: Transparent pricing. No hidden fees. Cancel anytime.
pricing.creditsDesc: No subscription needed. Credits never expire.
pricing.enterpriseDesc: More than 100 calculations per month? Contact us for custom pricing.
pricing.guarantee1Desc: No annual contract. Cancel at any time.
pricing.guarantee2Desc: Data stored in EU. Suitable for NL, BE and DE.
pricing.guarantee3Desc: Monthly invoice on company name and VAT number.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.successBanner: Payment successful — credits have been added to your account.

auth.title: Sign in to EarthGND
auth.subtitle: Enter your email address. We'll send you a login link.
auth.successDesc: We've sent a login link to {email}
